---
title: "Georgiana Cowper-Temple, Lady Mount Temple"
---

## Georgiana Cowper-Temple, Lady Mount Temple

**Dates:** (1821?-1901)

**Maiden name:** (Tollemache)

### Description

wife of the 1st Lord Mount Temple

### Biography

Vice president of the anti-vivisection society.

### Letters

- Letter from March 10th [1887]
- Letter from July 27th 1876
- Letter from June 21 [1874]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
